verification_gate: Red tests fail first for: Complete var list captured; Durable vs volatile tagged; Cross-checked vs T1.2 tier map; green only when all pass with a recorded proof record.

gate_result.red_first: gates executed red with the implementation absent (3/3 files failing), green at HEAD (3/3)
gate_result.capture_evidence: scripts/enumerate-runtime-env.mjs live-captures the ten-var agent surface (CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR, CODEX_HOME, YAZELIX_STATE_DIR, XDG_DATA_HOME, XDG_STATE_HOME, XDG_RUNTIME_DIR, ICM_DB, CARGO_TARGET_DIR, RUSTUP_HOME, TMPDIR) into planning-spine-v0/docs/runtime_env_enumeration.json: 10 vars, 6 on /run tmpfs, 2 durable-on-run.
gate_result.tagging_evidence: Every entry carries its tier (durable/volatile/portable/unset) and misplaced flag; the pre-migration truth is recorded honestly: CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR (and CODEX_HOME) are durable-class state living on /run tmpfs — the exact 2026-07-21 loss surface.
gate_result.crosscheck_evidence: Tier and misplaced values are sourced from and asserted equal to the T1.2 tier map (isolation_tier_map.json) for every mapped var; the generator regenerates live to a temp path in CI without touching the committed artifact.
gate_result.product_execution_evidence: The enumeration runs against the real session environment; the spec re-executes it live under vitest.

proof_summary: ARCHBP-072 is complete: the agent runtime env-var surface is enumerated live — ten vars captured with durable/volatile tags cross-checked against the T1.2 tier map, honestly recording the two durable-class residents still on /run tmpfs (CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR, CODEX_HOME) as the restart-gated migration surface.
